expectations.text: [defect_replay][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: SDK/API visible outcomes like window title become explicit scenarios
expectations.evidence: result.md includes explicit scenarios with observable verification leaves for window title, e.g. “Workstation window title is correct on edit (double-click entry)” with checks: “Window title equals the clicked report’s name …” and “Window title is not a generic placeholder…”, plus “Workstation window title is correct when creating a new blank report” verifying it is “not `newReportWithApplication`.”

expectations.text: [defect_replay][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: execution_notes.md states Phase 4a anchors were used and claims “Subcategory-first structure; atomic nested steps; observable verification leaves.” result.md is titled “Phase 4a — Defect Replay Scenario Addendum” and presents replay-anchor subcategory bullets with nested steps and explicit verification leaves, and includes explicit state-transition chains (e.g., Save-As overwrite and pause-mode run).
